column2: # Summary of the GLMM for target accuracy
term == "grouptask_only" ~ "Task Only vs Item Only group",
term == "groupBoth_item_task" ~ "Both (Item + Task) vs Item Only group",
knitr::kable(h6_summary %>% select(term, estimate, std.error, statistic, p_val, conf.low, conf.high),
caption = "GLMM results predicting the probability of correct responses at the trial level. The reference condition is the Item Only group at the Pre-boundary position.",
